name: Dark Spitfire
description: Dark Spitfire is the dark counterpart of Spitfire in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Dark Hot Streak. In the original version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, Dark Spitfire has been renamed as Shadow Spitfire and is part of the Dark element. He is absent in the revamped version of the game.
biography: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery -- Petrified Darkness -- which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it -- combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

story.content: While on a special mission, a team of Skylanders discovered a secret lair where Kaos was experimenting with a new discovery -- Petrified Darkness -- which he initially intended to use to stage a coup against Skylands. In their fight to stop Kaos, the lair exploded, releasing a cloud of pure Darkness. The Skylanders knew they couldn't let it escape, so they absorbed this energy, transforming them into dark versions of themselves. Fortunately, Spyro learned to tame that darkness within him long ago. So with his help, these Skylanders now have also learned to control it -- combining its power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

trivia: He is the only Dark elemental Skylander absent in the revamp version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
He and Light Jet-Vac are the only Skylanders from the beta and 1.0 version of Ring of Heroes absent in the revamp.

He is the only Dark edition counterpart of a newly-introduced SuperCharger. The rest of the Dark edition SuperChargers are counterparts of Skylanders from previous games (Dark Super Shot Stealth Elf originated from Spyro's Adventure and Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong and Dark Hammer Slam Bowser originated from the Super Mario Bros. series).
gameplay: Dark Spitfire shares the same upgrades as his regular counterpart, but his fire is now imdued with the effects of Petrified Darkness.

basic.name: Fuel Injected Claws
basic.content: [1 Enemy] Dashes towards an enemy and swings an uppercut to [decrease Endurance]. Mana cost: 2 Cooldown: 18 seconds

basic.name: Nitro Boost
basic.content: [All Enemies] Stirs up all enemies at high speed and casts [ATK DOWN] for 1 turn(s). Mana cost: 3 Cooldown: 14 seconds

basic_upgrades.name: Triathlete
basic_upgrades.content: [SELF] If there's a team member with the [Provoke] Effect, excluding yourself, steals the beneficial effect x0 whenever you attack the enemy.

basic_upgrades.name: Triathlete Boost
basic_upgrades.content: [1 Enemy] Slams into an enemy at high speed. This attack ignores 30% of the target's DEF. If enemy has [DEF UP] effect, deals a bonus hit which ignores 50% of DEF. Mana cost: 5 Cooldown: 8 seconds

basic_upgrades.name: Intensified Fury
basic_upgrades.content: All allies gain [CRIT DMG UP] for 1 turn(s) if the enemy gets [knocked down]. Mana cost: 0 Cooldown: 1
